title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.505 - Corrected returns prima facie evidence in election contests
text:
115.505.  Corrected returns prima facie evidence in election contests. — In case of an election contest, the corrected returns of the verification board shall be prima facie evidence of the vote at the election to the same extent and in the same manner as are the returns of the election judges and election authority on election day.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 12.320) 
Effective 1-01-78
